purpose: Defensive local YARA signature workspace for StageHawk malware-analysis orchestration.

generic.confidence_meaning: heuristic triage signal, not confirmed malware
generic.description: Generic suspicious PE or static-analysis indicators. Matches may be noisy and require analyst review.

known_families.confidence_meaning: verified attributed family rule when populated
known_families.description: Verified and attributed malware-family rules only. This collection should remain empty until rules have trusted provenance and false-positive review.

experimental.description: Research or testing rules. Matches are not strong evidence alone and should not drive attribution.

quality_policy: Rules must be source-tracked with clear provenance.
Rules must be reviewed for false-positive risk before production use.
External rule packs must not be imported blindly.
Known-family attribution requires verified rule provenance and review notes.
Experimental matches must be treated as analyst-supporting signals only.
safety_notes: This workspace is for defensive malware-analysis orchestration only.
Local signature scanning must not execute samples on the controller host.
Dynamic execution remains CAPE-only in the isolated sandbox environment.
Do not add malware creation, persistence, evasion, spreading, or payload behavior.
